REFERENCE: The reference claims an article by N. Sharma titled "Clinician engineers-the time is now" published in The Lancet on 2020-06-05, volume 397, issue 10278, pages 967-967, with DOI 10.3167.991.53/i37gfw92-o6y6g. However, the DOI format is malformed: a legitimate DOI consists of a prefix (e.g., 10.1038) followed by a slash and a suffix containing only alphanumeric characters and certain punctuation (e.g., ., -, _, ~). The given DOI contains multiple extra dots and an improper suffix ("991.53/i37gfw92-o6y6g"), which does not resolve to any known record in Crossref or other DOI registration agencies. Furthermore, a search of The Lancet's 2020 June 5 issue (volume 397, issue 10278) shows no article matching this title or author. The page range 967-967 (a single page) is unusual for The Lancet, which typically publishes longer research articles. Therefore, the reference appears to be fabricated or contains incorrect bibliographic data.
